pi_items.source: Web search results confirm this is Wikipedia's main page portal. Search results show: 'Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia' at https://www.wikipedia.org/
Web search results and URL analysis confirm the domain is wikipedia.org. The URL https://www.wikipedia.org/ uses the wikipedia.org domain.

Web search results show the actual page title is 'Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia'. The pattern 'Wikipedia' matches the actual title as it starts with 'Wikipedia' and the verifier script uses startswith() matching for pattern validation.

privileged_info_summary: The task interacts with the real Wikipedia website at https://www.wikipedia.org/, which displays the page title 'Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia'. The domain is wikipedia.org. The task uses real Microsoft Edge browser to add bookmarks, not synthetic data or fake websites. All metadata claims about URLs, domain patterns, and title patterns are correct and verified against the actual website.
